'''R2-Q8''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]].
The companion of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Shaparo]], R2-Q8's [[Intellex IV/Legends|Intellex IV]] [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] was modified by his owner to access the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] records of the [[Dnalvec]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].
